features: ♻️ ECO EXFOLIATING GLOVE - Take your exfoliation game to the next level! Your first skincare step to perfectly prep and prime your skin, buff away dead skin cells and smooth out dry or rough skin.
🧡💜 2 DUAL SIDED GLOVES AND 2 EXFOLIATION INTENSITIES - 'Peachy Pink' (250D) for that ultimate deep exfoliation body scrub. 'Lush Lilac' (150D) covers you for more of a gentle buff and regular use.
✨ WE'VE GOT YOU COVERED - Our shower mitts banish bumps and breakouts, target keratosis pilaris and prevent ingrown hairs. What's more they encourage blood flow and promote improved circulation.
🫶 THE PERFECT SELF TAN REMOVER - Our Kessa mitts tackle the most stubborn of self tan marks so you can rejoice in that refreshed and rejuvinated all over body glow! An easy and effective exfoliator.
🌎 ABOUT US - Love Cocobo believe in being kind to your skin and our planet. Our gloves are plant powered and made from 100% viscose. We don't use plastic polyester elastic on the cuffs of our gloves!
